mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_card_batch (tenant_id, batch_code, name, denomination, total_count, status, expire_at, created_by_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{batchCode}, #{name}, #{denomination}, #{totalCount}, #{status}, #{expireAt}, #{createdById}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_card_batch SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recharge_card (tenant_id, batch_id, card_prefix, card_hash, denomination, status, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{batchId}, #{cardPrefix}, #{cardHash}, #{denomination}, #{status}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, batch_id, card_prefix, card_hash, denomination, status, expire_at, redeemed_user_id, redeemed_at, disabled_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM recharge_card WHERE card_hash = #{cardHash}

SELECT c.id AS id, c.tenant_id AS tenantId, c.batch_id AS batchId, b.batch_code AS batchCode, c.card_prefix AS cardPrefix, c.denomination AS denomination, c.status AS status, c.expire_at AS expireAt, c.redeemed_user_id AS redeemedUserId, u.username AS redeemedUsername, u.display_name AS redeemedUserDisplayName, c.redeemed_at AS redeemedAt, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM recharge_card c INNER JOIN recharge_card_batch b ON b.id = c.batch_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = c.redeemed_user_id WHERE c.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

UPDATE recharge_card SET status = 'REDEEMED', redeemed_user_id = #{userId}, redeemed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ENABLED' AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > #{now}) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM recharge_card_batch b WHERE b.id = recharge_card.batch_id AND b.status = 'ENABLED' ) RETURNING denomination
mapper.update: UPDATE recharge_card SET status = #{status}, disabled_reason = #{disabledReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
